Moshi Turner's website!

home!    blog!    

welcome! this is my website!

About me

I go by Moshi Turner these days*. My pronouns are they/them.

I live in Austin, Texas and currently work on optical hand tracking at Collabora. Recently I’ve taken a lot of interest in math, state estimation, AR/VR, machine learning/data engineering and FOSS. This has been a pretty crazy happy culmination of those five things.

I’m very happy about the hand tracking work, so here’s the best showcase I happen to have at the moment: https://twitter.com/moshimeowshiVR/status/1582102996242280448

I’m also known for

  • Being pretty good at AR/VR demos
  • Skateboarding, quad/inline skating
  • Being a VRChat catgirl
  • Being an annoying punk rock kid, stage diving and moshpits
  • Traveling the world a bit. Still need to go to: Taipei, Shenzhen, Glacier National Park, Iquitos, Scotland.
  • Being a reasonably-sized space nerd. I’ve seen the Starship SN10 launch in person and it has so far been the literal high point of my life.
  • Being a life extension/transhumanism nerd. I absolutely am invested in the modern search for the fountain of youth.
  • Explorations into user-hostile retro web design. To my knowledge, this website has given three people motion sickness!

What I look like

real life!
VR!

* If you must know, my legal name is still Moses Turner, and I once did go by that name. Not anymore.
